name: io.qase/mcp-server
title: Qase Test Management
description: Official MCP server for Qase — manage test cases, runs, suites, defects via AI tools.

environmentVariables.name: QASE_API_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Qase API token from app.qase.io > Settings > API Tokens

environmentVariables.name: QASE_API_DOMAIN
environmentVariables.description: Custom API domain for enterprise (default: api.qase.io)
